Warning: freedom-finance[dot]nl
Warning: freedom-finance[dot]nl
07.08.24
•
Supervision and Regulation
The Liechtenstein Financial Market Authority (FMA) points out that the operator of the website freedom-finance[dot]nl is not licensed or registered by the FMA.
In particular, the operator of the website freedom-finance[dot]nl is not permitted to provide financial services requiring a license or registration by the FMA. It is highly recommended not to use the website freedom-finance[dot]nl for financial services, in particular not to respond to offers or to transfer funds or cryptocurrencies.
This content has been translated using a fully automated machine translation tool. Some content may not be accurately translated.
